explanations.4: This sets WSL's memory to 20GB total, leaving 12GB free for Windows itself (the comment assumes your computer has 32GB total).
explanations.10: This makes WSL use the same network as Windows instead of being isolated, so localhost:8000 in WSL and Windows both refer to the same service.
explanations.18: This tells WSL to gradually release unused memory back to Windows instead of holding onto it forever, but it's experimental so it might not be completely stable.
